name: kms_key_policy
intent: An aws_kms_key must have a key policy defined — either an inline `policy` attribute on the key, or a separate aws_kms_key_policy resource that targets it — so access to the CMK is explicitly scoped rather than left to the permissive AWS default.
hint: add a policy to the aws_kms_key (inline policy = jsonencode({...}) or a separate aws_kms_key_policy resource)
